subcodes.first_line: O servants! Know ye the worth of these days of the Lord of all names, and arise to make good what hath been lost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان قدر ایام مالک انام را بدانید و بر تدارک مافات قیام نمائید بحر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
